title: genista tinctoria subsp. tenuifolia
intro: Genista tinctoria subsp. tenuifolia, also known as narrow-leaved broom or yellow broom, is a flowering plant in the legume family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Genista tinctoria subsp. tenuifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antiseptic agent, making it a popular choice for treating various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a range of applications in natural medicine.
